metadata.description: Satya Promise Tracker — key promises made by Indian political leaders, linked to news evidence

promises.promise: Double farmer income by 2022
promises.source_description: PM Modi's address at farmers rally, Bareilly
promises.gemma_reasoning: The promise was made in 2014, and the deadline has passed.

promises.notes: Multiple government reports and farmer groups confirmed income did not double by 2022. Inflation-adjusted farm income actually declined in several states.
